calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, Judge Gerald Ragan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Petitioner: Lourdes Coello, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Aaliyah Elvia Montes and Noelia Vermaine Watson, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Priscila Elvia Montes and Noelia Esther Montes.
Decree signed in open court.
